scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/docx-wasm --target web --out-dir "$(pwd)/pkg" && mkdir -p src/generated && cp pkg/docx_wasm.js pkg/docx_wasm.d.ts pkg/docx_wasm_bg.wasm.d.ts pkg/docx_wasm_bg.wasm src/generated/ && cp pkg/docx_wasm_bg.wasm src/docx_wasm_bg.wasm
scripts.build:js: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap --clean --shims && cp src/docx_wasm_bg.wasm dist/docx_wasm_bg.wasm
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:js
